characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, long straight brown hair. She has a casual, everyday look.
characters.wardrobe: A long-sleeved, collared shirt with horizontal black and white stripes, and light-colored pants.
characters.demeanor: Initially frustrated, then engaged and focused as she interacts with the app.

characters.appearance: Animated female character with red hair, visible on the tablet screen.
characters.wardrobe: Not clearly visible, but appears to be wearing a light-colored top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलना बहुत मुश्किल है। [Speaking English is very difficult.]
Character B says: What is your name? [What is your name?]
Character A says: My name is Sara. [My name is Sara.]
Character B says: How are you doing today? [How are you doing today?]
Character A says: I am fine, thank you. [I am fine, thank you.]
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I... [Yes, I...]
Character B says: Do you mean: Yes, I speak a little English. [Do you mean: Yes, I speak a little English.]
Character A says: Yes, I speak a little English. [Yes, I speak a little English.]
Character B says: What do you do? [What do you do?]
Character A says: I... working...? [I... working...?]
Character B says: Do you mean: I am working right now. [Do you mean: I am working right now.]
Character A says: I am working right now. [I am working right now.]
Character A says: मैं रोज़ English बोलने की practice कैसे करूँ? [How can I practice speaking English every day?]
Character B says: Just download Supernova. [Just download Supernova.]
Character A says: मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [I will download Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable frustration about language learning.
- Demonstrates the interactive AI tutor correcting mistakes gently in real-time.
- Shows that learning can happen while multitasking (washing dishes).
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.

English बोलना बहुत मुश्किल है। (Speaking English is very difficult.)
What is your name?
My name is Sara.
How are you doing today?
I am fine, thank you.
Do you speak English?
Yes, I...
Yes, I speak a little English.
What do you do?
I... working...?
I am working right now.
मैं रोज़ English बोलने की practice कैसे करूँ? (How can I practice speaking English every day?)
Just download Supernova.
मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। (I will download Supernova right now.)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides the final brand impression.
- Shows where to download the app.
